debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · simp [beq_iff_eq.mp h1, h.2.2.2.2]
    · rw [ihl h.2.2.1]
      exact ⟨.inl, fun | .inl hi => hi | .inr hi => by have := h.2.1 _ hi; linarith⟩
    · rw [ihr h.2.2.2.1]
      exact ⟨.inr, fun | .inl hi => by have := h.1 _ hi; have := beq_iff_eq.not.mp h1; linarith | .inr hi => hi⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h1; simp [h1, h.2.2.2.2]
    · rw [ihl h.2.2.1]; exact ⟨.inl, λ | .inl h3 => h3 | .inr h3 => (h2.not_le (h.2.1 _ h3)).elim⟩
    · rw [ihr h.2.2.2.1]; rw [beq_eq_false_iff_ne] at h1
      exact ⟨.inr, λ | .inl h3 => (h2 (lt_of_le_of_ne (h.1 _ h3) h1.symm)).elim | .inr h3 => h3⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, mem, beq_iff_eq, eq_comm]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, mem, ihl h.2.2.1, ihr h.2.2.2.1]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h1; subst h1; simp [h.2.2.2.2]
    · exact ⟨.inl, fun | .inl h_in => h_in | .inr h_in => by
        have := le_antisymm (le_of_lt h2) (h.2.1 _ h_in); simp [this] at h1⟩
    · exact ⟨.inr, fun | .inl h_in => by
        have := le_antisymm (h.1 _ h_in) (le_of_not_lt h2); simp [this] at h1 | .inr h_in => h_in⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, mem]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, mem, IsOrdered] at *
    split_ifs with h_eq h_lt
    · simp [beq_iff_eq.1 h_eq, h.2.2.2.2]
    · rw [ihl h.2.2.1]
      exact ⟨.inl, fun | .inl h_in => h_in | .inr h_in => (h_lt.not_le (h.2.1 _ h_in)).elim⟩
    · rw [ihr h.2.2.2.1]
      have h_gt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) (by simpa using h_eq)
      exact ⟨.inr, fun | .inl h_in => (h_gt.not_le (h.1 _ h_in)).elim | .inr h_in => h_in⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v l r ihl ihr =>

    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · replace h1 := beq_iff_eq.mp h1; subst h1; exact hV
    · simp at h1 h2; rw [ihl hLO, or_iff_left]
      intro hr; have := hR _ hr; linarith
    · simp at h1 h2; rw [ihr hRO, or_iff_right]
      intro hl; have := hL _ hl; linarith

    · simp [beq_iff_eq] at h1; simp [h1, h.2.2.2.2]
    · rw [ihl h.2.2.1]; simp at h2
      exact ⟨.inl, fun | .inl hl => hl | .inr hr => (h2.not_le (h.2.1 _ hr)).elim⟩
    · rw [ihr h.2.2.2.1]; simp [beq_iff_eq] at h1; simp at h2
      have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h2) h1
      exact ⟨.inr, fun | .inl hl => (this.not_le (h.1 _ hl)).elim | .inr hr => hr⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    rcases h with ⟨hl, hr, hlo, hro, hv⟩
    simp [fastCheckMem]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · simp at h1; simp [h1, hv]
    · rw [ihl hlo]; simp at h1
      exact ⟨Or.inl, fun | Or.inl h => h | Or.inr h => (not_le.2 h2 (hr label h)).elim⟩
    · rw [ihr hro]; simp at h1
      exact ⟨Or.inr, fun | Or.inr h => h | Or.inl h => (h1 (le_antisymm (hl label h) (not_lt.1 h2)).symm).elim⟩

induction l with
  | leaf x => simp [fastCheckMem, mem, beq_iff_eq]
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, mem]
    split_ifs with h1 h2
    · rw [beq_iff_eq] at h1; subst h1; simp [h.2.2.2.2]
    · rw [ihl h.2.2.1]
      exact ⟨.inl, fun | .inl hx => hx | .inr hx => absurd (by simpa using h2) (not_lt.mpr (h.2.1 _ hx))⟩
    · rw [ihr h.2.2.2.1]
      have hlt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (not_lt.mp (by simpa using h2)) (beq_iff_eq.not.mp h1)
      exact ⟨.inr, fun | .inl hx => absurd (h.1 _ hx) (not_le.mpr hlt) | .inr hx => hx⟩
